mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "u.id", a.old_pwd AS "oldPwd", a.new_pwd AS "newPwd", a.ip AS "ip", a.ipcity AS "ipcity", a.create_date AS "createDate",
u.phone AS "u.phone", u.acount AS "u.acount", u.idno AS "u.idno", u.nickname AS "u.nickname"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_change_paypwd_log( id, uid, old_pwd, new_pwd, ip, ipcity, create_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{oldPwd}, #{newPwd}, #{ip}, #{ipcity}, #{createDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_change_paypwd_log SET uid = #{u.id}, old_pwd = #{oldPwd}, new_pwd = #{newPwd}, ip = #{ip}, ipcity = #{ipcity} WHERE id = #{id}
